scope.question: Run a readiness proof for promotion of the D+Q bone headache adverse-event extraction candidate.

inputs.summary: User asked whether the system had been tested sufficiently and approved a readiness proof before continuing broad feature work.
Promotion-ready headache adverse-event extraction candidate with four complete accepting supervisor-review lanes.
Triage recommended promotion dry-run for the headache candidate before accepted-record release.
Promotion dry-run exposed an unresolved overlapping-candidate proposal on the shared D+Q safety synthesis group.

outputs.summary: Promotion readiness proof completed. The initial dry-run correctly blocked promotion on an unresolved overlap with the broader PMC full-text candidate; a narrow reconciliation decision resolved the compatible safety-synthesis overlap; the second dry-run passed; the real promotion moved the headache candidate to accepted with reconciliation metadata.

proposed_records.rationale: Promotes the candidate to accepted after review gates and reconciliation gates passed.

quality_checks.summary: Initial dry-run correctly blocked promotion on unresolved reconciliation issue overlapping-candidate-3524dc80fd8b.
Recorded resolve-headache-pmc-safety-overlap-2026-06-23 as a compatible-candidate reconciliation decision for the shared safety synthesis-group path.
Promotion dry-run passed after the reconciliation decision was added.
npm run promote:candidate -- senolytics-dq-bone-headache-ae-extraction-pilot-2026-06-23 --status accepted promoted the candidate to accepted.
npm run validate:records passed after adding the reconciliation decision.

next_actions: Refresh generated control-plane state and run full repository verification.
Treat the discovered reconciliation-gate block as expected process behavior rather than a schema or audit failure.
